grant_title: Local News Infrastructure Improvements Grants for Scranton
project_area: Infrastructure improvements including pedestrian and bicycle infrastructure, building renovations, sidewalks, and park connectors
demographic_requirements: Projects must enhance accessibility for pedestrians, cyclists, and individuals with disabilities, and support community revitalization in downtown Scranton and Pine Brook.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include local government entities, non-profits, private developers, and community organizations. Projects must focus on improving pedestrian and bicycle safety, accessibility, and connectivity, as well as revitalizing historic and commercial areas in Scranton.
